metaDescription: Respite is a Minecraft 1.21.1 Fabric mod that makes the night worth living through: sleep accelerates time instead of skipping it, supper heals you overnight, and phantoms guard the heights and the new moon.
ogDescription: A vitality overhaul for Minecraft 1.21.1 Fabric. Sleep accelerates time instead of skipping it; the night becomes part of the game.

hero.sub: Respite takes over the night: sleeping rushes time visibly past while furnaces smelt and crops grow, a hearty supper heals you overnight, and phantoms trade their insomnia grudge for a territory — the high peaks and the new moon.

blocks.html: Respite is out now for Minecraft 1.21.1 on Fabric. Download it from Modrinth, CurseForge, or GitHub Releases.

sections.title: The Night, Overhauled
sections.lede: Seven systems that turn sleep from a skip button into part of the game. Full feature list →

items.title: Continuous Time-Lapse
html: Sleeping accelerates time up to 20× instead of jumping to morning — furnaces smelt, crops grow, and the stars streak by while you rest.

items.title: Restful Saturation
html: Go to bed on a full stomach and saturation converts to healing overnight — every 2 saturation restores a heart by dawn.

items.title: Phantoms of the Heights
html: Insomnia is gone. Phantoms patrol above Y=100 on any night, and everywhere under a new moon — one night in eight.

items.title: Weariness
html: Three days without rest slows your natural healing by 25% until you sleep. No monsters are ever sent after you.

items.title: The Chronometer
html: A copper-and-redstone timepiece emitting signal 1–15 by time of day — doors that bolt at dusk, lamps at nightfall.

items.title: The Caffeinated Brew
html: A campfire-steeped cocoa drink that clears Weariness and grants 90 seconds of Haste — all-nighters, done deliberately.

items.title: The Bedroll
html: A one-tile camp bed of string over wool — unroll it anywhere, sleep the night, and it rolls back into your pack at dawn. It never sets your spawn and heals at half a real bed's rate.

sections.title: Fair by Construction
sections.lede: On a server, every sleeper adds an equal share of the acceleration — two of four players in bed run the night at half the maximum. Nobody's sleep is wasted, and nobody's insomnia holds the whole server's night hostage.

blocks.html: Part of Concord — a modular collection of system overhauls. Install any, combine all; Respite is complete on its own.
